name: HomeGlow
description: HomeGlow is a self-hosted, touch-first dashboard for wall-mounted home displays: chores with a clam reward system, calendar sync (ICS/CalDAV/Google/Apple), weather, photos, a screensaver, and custom HTML widgets. Runs as two Docker containers (Fastify + SQLite backend, React frontend) inside a Debian LXC.

notes.text: First run has no login; set an optional Admin PIN in the Admin Panel. Do not expose HomeGlow directly to the public internet.
ENCRYPTION_KEY is generated once in /opt/homeglow/.env. Keep it stable — changing it invalidates stored third-party credentials.
